title: Converting Oracle data types to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how Gemini, an AI assistant, helps developers convert Oracle database data types such as VARCHAR2, NUMBER, and DATE to their PostgreSQL equivalents. The video covers schema and code conversion with precision and internationalization support using Database Migration Service.
